title: Software Updates
drDigitalIntro: Software updates fix security vulnerabilities (weaknesses hackers can exploit). Apple regularly releases updates to macOS and apps. Don't skip them — these fixes are critical. Enable automatic updates so you don't have to remember. Check System Settings > General > Software Update. Security researchers discover vulnerabilities constantly, and updates patch them. A well-updated Mac is a secure Mac.
drDigitalHint: Updates are usually quick and painless.
